transcript:
CALLER: Hi, I need my asthma inhaler prescription renewed. I'm running low and my last prescription was from your clinic.
AGENT: Of course. Could I have your name and the doctor who prescribed it?
CALLER: Arvind Kulkarni. It was from Dr. Ramesh Iyer. Maybe 10 weeks ago?
AGENT: I see your record, Arvind. Your last prescription was for Budecort 200 inhaler. Since it's been 10 weeks, I'll put in a refill request to Dr. Iyer. He'll review and approve typically within 24 hours.
CALLER: Can I collect it from the pharmacy directly?
AGENT: Once approved, the e-prescription will be sent to our in-house pharmacy. You can collect it during pharmacy hours — 8 AM to 9 PM. We'll SMS you when it's ready.
CALLER: That's great. Thank you.
